items.name: Fallen Knight's Armor
items.description:
Oath of the Pale Knight:

"By this oath, my life is forfeit. By this oath, I am dead. I take my place amongst the ranks of the dead. I rise to join my brothers in death. The Crusade is life. I go to battle to reclaim my life. And by the hand of victory, I shall live again."
